name: TypeScript Structural Similarity Refactoring Adapter

source.notes: Use as an external TypeScript duplicate/similarity detector for refactoring plans. The repository is a private edition of mizchi/similarity and includes Rust native/WASM cores with a TypeScript CLI wrapper.

capabilities: style canonicalization for common refactoring equivalents

evidence: similarity-ts package version or repo commit

boundaries: Use detected similarities as refactoring candidates, not automatic proof that code should be merged.
Require semantic review before changing behavior.
Run project tests after every refactor slice.
Record false positives and false negatives as benchmark feedback.
forbidden_claims: Similarity score alone proves behavior equivalence.
All detected duplicates should be merged.
A clean report proves the codebase is well factored.
Fable/Mythos performance is reproduced solely by this tool.

checks: README benchmark claims are treated as repository-provided evidence
run on a target project with JSON output when dependencies are available
